knowledgeBase.qrWarningAdvice: Consider updating the article instead, or removing the physical QR code first.

contentAuthoring.finishV1DescNoCount: In-progress learners stay on Version {{version}}. New learners will see Version {{nextVersion}}.
contentAuthoring.notStartedAutoV2: Learners who haven't started yet will automatically see Version {{version}}.

contentAuthoring.geoMethodDesc: Full workflow (recommended): research plan, evidence, redline draft, and citations in a dedicated wizard. AI Chat: conversational Q&A, then AI writes the variant body when you generate. Manual copy: duplicate source content as a draft—edit by hand; no AI run from this step.
